name: Cheap-Cluster Lab — Zone friendly-fire, Cover saves, Ranged disadvantage
description: Bench for the three quick D-SPELL/COND/ACT fixes. ZONE FRIENDLY-FIRE (D-ZONE-1): have Gareth drop Spike Growth (or Elara her Web) on a patch that also covers an ally, then walk Valeria into it — she takes the damage / gets restrained just like an enemy would. Only Spirit-Guardians-style auras that follow the caster still spare your side; a placed cloud is indiscriminate now. RANGED DISADVANTAGE (D-ACT-4): with Kael, shoot the Distant Sentry on the far right (past 150 ft, the longbow's normal range) — the to-hit rolls with disadvantage and the log says [long range]. Then shoot anything while the Goblin Skirmisher is still adjacent to Kael — that also rolls with disadvantage, logged [foe within 5 ft]; step away and the penalty disappears. A shot past 600 ft is refused entirely. COVER ON DEX SAVES (D-ACT-3): two cultists stand in a line with a three-quarters-cover wall between them — the Exposed Cultist out front, the Covered Cultist tucked behind the wall. Drop Elara's Fireball ON the Exposed Cultist: the blast still reaches the Covered Cultist at its edge, but with the wall between the blast's center and him his Dexterity save logs [cover: +5] (half cover would be +2), while the Exposed Cultist at ground zero gets no such bonus. Note (RAW): cover is measured from the blast's CENTRE, so a creature you center the blast on never has cover — that is why aiming straight at one target shows nothing. Cover now helps the DEX save, not just AC.
